name: Do I need a big dataset to build a good FAQ for AEO?
description: No. Support tickets, sales calls, and common objections are usually enough to start.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a big dataset to build a good FAQ for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you already have support tickets, sales notes, or call transcripts, you have enough material to start. The real challenge is choosing the few questions that matter most and turning them into concise, visible answers. You do not need perfect data to begin.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. Support tickets, sales calls, and common objections are usually enough to start.
